title: P≠NP Tropical No-Inverse Deep Dive

tropical_no_inverse_core.description: MAX-PLUS has no additive inverse; fundamental obstruction

verification_vs_search.reason: depth gap is the P≠NP gap

fpt_class.reason: bounded EML-2; does not breach inf

lemma_limit.description: Tropical No-Inverse kills all EML-2-only approaches
